description_long: This street food stall features a sturdy rectangular frame with a faux-marble countertop and a prominent red awning adorned with playful sushi illustrations and Japanese characters. The front panel displays a large sushi graphic and bold kanji, while the sides are decorated with repeating sushi motifs, enhancing its visual appeal. The lower section consists of wooden-textured panels and open shelving, housing various food containers, utensils, and a drink dispenser. The stall is supported by slender black metal legs, giving it a lightweight yet stable appearance. The countertop provides ample space for food preparation and serving, while the open shelving allows for easy access to supplies. The overall design is both functional and inviting, ideal for attracting customers in a busy urban environment.
description: A vibrant street food stall with a red sushi-themed awning, faux-marble countertop, and open shelving for food and utensils. The design is functional, colorful, and inviting, perfect for urban street settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sushi-themed red awning with Japanese characters, sushi graphics, and a well-organized serving counter with visible food containers and utensils.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the repeating sushi roll graphics on the red awning and the depth of the marble-like countertop.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full expanse of the marble-textured countertop and the arrangement of items on the counter and shelves below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring multiple sushi graphics on the awning and a clear look at the open shelving and food containers.
attribute_signage: Red awning with large black and white Japanese kanji, sushi illustrations (nigiri and maki), and chopsticks, placed prominently on the front and sides in a playful, cartoonish style.
attribute_serving_counter: A wide, faux-marble countertop with a rectangular shape, supported by a metal frame, and featuring open shelving below for storage and display of food items and utensils.
attribute_food_display: Food is displayed in open trays and containers on the counter and shelves, easily visible and accessible to customers, with no protective glass or covers.
